name: miller_walk
description: Grain In, Goods Out (The Miller Walk), q.side_survey slot 76: accept Guo the Miller's survey at the Hua Zhan mill, walk within 5b of the Grain Buyer stall (Ping, hz_wheat_trader) and the Granary store (Feng, hz_granary) so the grain_survey tick latches both halves, then report back for the haircut payout and the paid-state dialog. No prerequisite tags — the intro gate is open on a fresh player; assumes fields_liberated < 4 (wheat traders not yet hostile) and re-runs accumulate CobbleDollars (the 300-fee rail has no reset).

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): the four chain tags + payout items --
-- beat 1: Guo the Miller at The Mill — accept the survey --

expect_screen_text: The Company owns the seed, and the field, and the silo. Grain in, goods out, they call it, like it is a courtesy they are doing me. Now they want the till as well.

I am the last mill in wheat country that still takes coin. The Granary stopped. The Grain Buyer in the square is telling my own customers the paper money is already dead. Do me one favour. Go and hear them both. Then come back and tell me I am wrong.

steps.comment: -- beat 2: the open pitch — stand at Ping's stall (hz_wheat_trader body, 5b latch) --
-- beat 3: the company store — stand at Feng's granary (hz_granary body, 5b latch) --
-- beat 4: report back — the payout entry (all_tags gate, priority 40) --

steps.wait_chat: the coin only fails where they say it fails

steps.comment: -- beat 5: paid-state dialog — the thanks entry replaces the payout --

expect_screen_text: Short, was it. It always is. They call it a rate. I call it a thumb on the scale you are not allowed to look at.
Keep your coin. Somebody in this town has to remember what it was worth before they decided it was worth less.
